column1: # CAC40 official index weights — TOP 25 ONLY
# REFERENCE ONLY: do not use in return calculations.
#   The CAC40 benchmark return is always taken from the ^FCHI price series
#   via data_core.fetch_benchmark(). These 25 weights are solely for
#   the index-concentration chart in the dashboard (Module C).
#   The remaining 15 weights require a licensed Euronext data subscription.
